name: Merchants Bancorp Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a Share of 8.25% Fixed-Rate Reset Series D Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock
summary: Merchants Bancorp Depositary Shares represent a fractional interest in preferred stock, offering a fixed-rate dividend with potential reset features, providing investors with a steady income stream. The company focuses on community banking and financial services. The headquarter location is in Carmel, Indiana.
